description: Court record in Hebrew. Location: Damietta (אי כפתור). (Or at least about Damietta.) Dated: Nisan 1360 Seleucid, which is 1049 CE. Concerns a debt of 19 gold coins resulting from the sale of fine linen (שש) of the government. Somebody wished the guarantors rather than a certain elder to be responsible. (Information from Goitein's index card.) Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
